mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gamedb.map_indicator (map_id, type, value, pos_x, pos_z, angle_y) VALUES (#{mapId}, #{type}, #{value}, #{posX}, #{posZ}, #{angleY})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gamedb.map_indicator WHERE map_id = #{mapId} AND pos_x = #{posX} AND pos_z = #{posZ}
mapper.select: SELECT map_id, type, value, pos_x, pos_z, angle_y FROM gamedb.map_indicator ORDER BY map_id
